hero.title:
Dark worlds.
Noir stories.
hero.description: Cenoir Studios creates immersive, narrative-driven experiences set in atmospheric world of NoSaints.

featured.label: Featured Project
featured.title: NoSaints: Blue Whale
featured.description: A dark and stylish first-person shooter with rich narrative and mystery, set in a world of NoSaints. You play as a bartender of the bar Blue Whale. Cook coctails, gather infor and recipies and go for a hunt!

pillars.title: Narrative First
pillars.text: Every mechanic, every environment, every encounter serves the story we want to tell.

pillars.title: Art-Driven
pillars.text: Stylized visuals that create mood and atmosphere beyond what realism alone can achieve.

pillars.title: Fresh combination of mechanics
pillars.text: Unique combination of the mechanics that will enrich and fill the noir world of NoSaints
